mapper.insert: insert into base_staff (regist_source, regist_source_id, dep_id, org_id, group_id, staff_code, realname, direct_supervisor, sex, certificate_type, certificate_no, birthday, phone, email, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, street_code, street_name, address, employment_type, state, created_by, created_name, created_date) VALUES (#{bean.registSource}, #{bean.registSourceId}, #{bean.depId}, #{bean.orgId}, #{bean.groupId}, #{bean.staffCode}, #{bean.realname}, #{bean.directSupervisor}, #{bean.sex}, #{bean.certificateType}, #{bean.certificateNo}, #{bean.birthday}, #{bean.phone}, #{bean.email}, #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceProvCode}, #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceProvName}, #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceCityCode}, #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceCityName}, #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceDistrictCode}, #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceDistrictName}, #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceStreetCode}, #{bean.addressDetail.invoiceStreetName}, #{bean.addressDetail.address}, #{bean.employmentType}, #{bean.state}, #{bean.createdBy}, #{bean.createdName}, #{bean.createdDate})
mapper.update:
update base_staff set dep_id=#{bean.staffDuty.depId}, org_id=#{bean.staffDuty.orgId}, realname=#{bean.realname}, sex=#{bean.sex}, certificate_type=#{bean.certificateType}, certificate_no=#{bean.certificateNo}, birthday=#{bean.birthday}, phone=#{bean.phone}, email=#{bean.email}, province_code=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceProvCode}, province_name=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceProvName}, city_code=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceCityCode}, city_name=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceCityName}, district_code=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceDistrictCode}, district_name=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceDistrictName}, street_code=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceStreetCode}, street_name=#{bean.addressDetail.invoiceStreetName}, employment_type=#{bean.employmentType},
direct_supervisor=#{bean.direct_supervisor},
regist_source=#{bean.registSource},
regist_source_id=#{bean.registSourceId},
address=#{bean.addressDetail.address} where id=#{bean.id}
mapper.select: select id as id, state as state, user_id as userId from base_staff where id = #{staffId} and deleted_flag = 0

update.foreach: update base_staff set user_id=#{item.userId} where id=#{item.id}

mapper.update: UPDATE base_staff set deleted_flag=1, modified_by=#{userId}, user_id=0, modified_date=now() where id = #{staffId}

update base_staff set state = #{state}, modified_by = #{userId}, modified_date = now() where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) from base_staff WHERE dep_id = #{depId} and deleted_flag=0

select from base_staff as staff left join base_staff_duty as duty on staff.id=duty.staff_id LEFT join base_staff_type as type on duty.staff_type_id=type.id where staff.id=#{queryParam.id} and staff.deleted_flag=0

SELECT
from base_staff as staff left join base_staff_duty as duty on staff.id=duty.staff_id LEFT join base_staff_type as type on duty.staff_type_id=type.id where staff.id=#{staffId} and staff.deleted_flag=0
select count(DISTINCT staff.id) from base_staff as staff left join base_staff_duty as duty on staff.id=duty.staff_id LEFT join base_staff_type as type on duty.staff_type_id=type.id where

select
from base_staff as staff left join base_staff_duty as duty on staff.id=duty.staff_id LEFT join base_staff_type as type on duty.staff_type_id=type.id where
GROUP BY staff.id

select from base_staff as staff left join base_staff_duty as duty on staff.id=duty.staff_id LEFT join base_staff_type as type on duty.staff_type_id=type.id where staff.dep_id = #{depId} and staff.deleted_flag=0
select id from base_staff where user_id=#{userId} and deleted_flag=0
select * from base_staff where user_id=#{userId} and deleted_flag=0

SELECT COUNT(s.id) FROM base_staff s LEFT JOIN base_staff_duty d on s.id = d.staff_id LEFT JOIN base_staff_type t ON d.staff_type_id= t.id
GROUP BY s.id

SELECT
FROM base_staff s LEFT JOIN base_staff_duty d on s.id = d.staff_id LEFT JOIN base_staff_type t ON d.staff_type_id= t.id

SELECT s.id FROM base_staff s LEFT JOIN base_staff_duty d on s.id = d.staff_id LEFT JOIN base_staff_type t ON d.staff_type_id= t.id
GROUP by s.id
SELECT count(distinct(s.id)) FROM base_staff s LEFT JOIN base_staff_duty d on s.id = d.staff_id LEFT JOIN base_staff_type t ON d.staff_type_id= t.id
select realname from base_staff where id=#{staffId}
select count(id) from base_staff
select id as id , realname as name , user_id as userId from base_staff
select id from base_staff where staff_code=#{staffCode} and group_id=#{groupId} and deleted_flag=0 limit 1
select * from base_staff where 1=1
select count(DISTINCT(id)) from base_staff where 1=1
mapper.sql: staff.id, staff.dep_id, staff.org_id, staff.group_id, staff.staff_code, staff.realname, staff.sex, staff.certificate_type, staff.certificate_no, staff.birthday, staff.phone, staff.email, staff.employment_type, staff.state, staff.user_id, staff.biz_code, staff.province_code, staff.province_name, staff.city_code, staff.city_name, staff.district_code, staff.district_name, staff.street_code, staff.street_name, staff.address, staff.created_by, staff.created_date, staff.modified_by, staff.modified_date, staff.direct_supervisor, staff.regist_source, staff.regist_source_id, duty.id as duty_id, duty.state, duty.staff_id, duty.group_id, duty.org_id, duty.dep_id, duty.start_date, duty.end_date, duty.created_date, duty.created_by, duty.modified_date, duty.modified_by, duty.staff_type_id, type.id as staff_type_id, type.type_name as staff_type_name

staff.id, staff.dep_id, staff.org_id, staff.staff_code, staff.realname, staff.sex, staff.certificate_type, staff.certificate_no, staff.birthday, staff.phone, staff.email, staff.employment_type, staff.state, staff.user_id, staff.biz_code, staff.province_code, staff.province_name, staff.city_code, staff.city_name, staff.district_code, staff.district_name, staff.street_code, staff.street_name, staff.address, staff.created_by, staff.created_date, staff.modified_by, staff.modified_date, type.id as staff_type_id, type.type_name as staff_type_name

duty.id, duty.state, duty.staff_id, duty.group_id, duty.org_id, duty.dep_id, duty.start_date, duty.end_date, duty.created_date, duty.created_by, duty.modified_date, duty.modified_by, duty.staff_type_id, duty.staff_type_biz_code

s.id , s.dep_id , s.org_id , s.staff_code , s.realname , s.direct_supervisor, s.sex, s.certificate_type, s.certificate_no , s.birthday , s.phone , s.email , s.province_code, s.province_name, s.city_code, s.city_name, s.district_code, s.district_name, s.street_code, s.street_name, s.address , s.employment_type, s.state , s.created_by , s.created_date , s.modified_by , s.modified_date, s.regist_source, s.user_id, d.staff_type_id, t.type_name
mapper.select:
select * from base_staff where 1=1
and ( staff_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{condition,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%') or realname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{condition,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%') )
mapper.update: update base_staff set state = 2, modified_date= #{modifiedDate}, modified_by = #{userId} where org_id = #{buId} and state = 1
mapper.select: select user_id from base_staff where state= 1 and user_id is not null and user_id != 0 and org_id = #{buId}
